facts.what: Delay in patient handover at pickup point.
facts.why: Ambiguous radio phraseology between ground and air crew.
facts.who: MEDEVAC crew, ground med team, range control.
facts.narrative: Operation objectives achieved but with schedule erosion due to communication ambiguity at the interface point.

analysis.content: The issue was mainly inter-team synchronization rather than aircrew technique. Standard phrase templates were not enforced.

recos.organisation: Assign one comms focal point on each side.
recos.rh: Brief all actors on confirmation loop before execution.
recos.soutien: Provide laminated phrase cards at staging points.
recos.entrainement: Run short comms rehearsal before each drill wave.

qwi.advice: Good adaptation by teams. Formalize single-point communications and strict readback at handover.
